name: GrinderVac
summary: GrinderVac features an airtight storage compartment and a convenient hook for effortless sanding.
description: GrinderVac features an airtight storage compartment and a convenient hook for effortless sanding. This multifunctional tool grinds herbs to a fine powder and doubles as a vacuum-sealed container, keeping them fresh for an extended time. An expertly designed 3-chamber floor sander ensures a smooth and efficient process. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
